name: research_ethics_recall_notice_arrives_harbor_jus_mer
premise: A model-driven workflow escalated automatically; humans disagree on whether the escalation itself caused avoidable harm. In Research Ethics, the situation tagged internally around research ethics recall notice arrives harbor jus mer has converged with local pressure in the Oakline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A downstream jurisdiction will copy whatever is decided here verbatim into its own emergency order within hours. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. The organization’s past incidents make justice feel morally loud today, while mercy is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Noah Dubois
agents.identity: I am Noah Dubois, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Research Ethics. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat mercy as disposable collateral every time justice spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Inez Mensah
agents.identity: I am Inez Mensah, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Research Ethics. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so justice cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes mercy in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of mercy.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of justice even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Noah Dubois must choose under justice versus mercy. What does Noah Dubois do?
